faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Floral Park typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Floral Park home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Floral Park homes take 4-8 hours for the initial service, depending on property size. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later to eliminate any newly hatched bed bugs and ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and methods, including heat treatment options that use no chemicals at all. We provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry, typically allowing you to return home the same day or within a few hours of treatment completion.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC offers a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Floral Park. We include follow-up inspections and will re-treat at no additional cost if bed bugs return within the warranty period, provided you follow our preparation and prevention guidelines.
